'''Tycho''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and one of the many [[Jedi instructor|instructors]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]—among those who direct about using scenarios from the war in training—and taught military strategy to [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] students for a term.<ref name="DR" />

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> Tycho asked each the Padawans in the lesson to rigorously evaluate which mistake the Jedi had made in the [[Battle of Honoghr/Legends|Battle of Honoghr]], a conflict where biological [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]] had cost millions of lives. Tycho also asked for each Padawan to give a recommendation for how the situation could have been better handled. One student, [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]], did well on the assignment, although he felt that the solution was more complicated than either the answer he had submitted or what Master Tycho believed.<ref name="DR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tycho was mentioned in ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', a novel written by [[Sean Stewart]] and published in [[2004]].<ref name="DR" />
